underlying_goal: Diagnose why an invalid artifact shape error was occurring in TaskWorker #4, with the expectation that the code should conform to the shape contract, not vice versa
friction_detail: Claude repeatedly assumed the shape contract was wrong and the code was right, requiring user to correct this assumption multiple times before Claude investigated properly.
brief_summary: User wanted Claude to diagnose an artifact shape violation and fix the code to match the contract; Claude initially proposed changing the shape instead, frustrating the user, but eventually updated project rules to enforce shape-contract-as-source-of-truth.
